title: Suspicious PowerShell execution
description: Encoded PowerShell command launched from a user-writable directory.

title: Impossible travel detected
description: Successful sign-ins originated from geographically distant locations within 18 minutes.

title: Multiple failed admin logins
description: A privileged account exceeded the failed authentication threshold.

title: Outbound connection to known C2
description: A workstation contacted infrastructure associated with command-and-control activity.

title: Mailbox forwarding rule created
description: A new external forwarding rule was added to an executive mailbox.

title: Unsigned binary launched
description: An unsigned executable started from the temporary downloads directory.

title: Large cloud storage download
description: A user downloaded an unusual volume of files from a sensitive project folder.

title: DNS tunneling pattern
description: A host generated high-entropy DNS queries at a regular interval.

title: New local administrator
description: A standard user was added to the local Administrators group.

title: Endpoint malware quarantined
description: A known credential-stealing payload was blocked and quarantined.

title: Public storage bucket exposed
description: A storage bucket policy changed to allow anonymous read access.

title: MFA fatigue activity
description: A user received repeated push challenges followed by a successful approval.
